summary: The diff adds a CricketStadium3D component and integrates it into InternationalMatch.tsx. Most core requirements appear implemented, but several specific acceptance criteria details are unclear or missing from the truncated diff. The implementation covers the main structural requirements (REQ-15 through REQ-18) with visible evidence, but REQ-19's crowd wave particle effects and floodlight cone effects are not clearly confirmed in the truncated content.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add stadium atmosphere particle/visual effects: rippling crowd wave animation as colored particles on the stands triggered on six and wicket events, and floodlight cone effects (semi-transparent light shafts from four corner towers) for a night-match stadium feel.
missing_requirements.reason: The CricketStadium3D.tsx file is truncated and does not show implementation of crowd wave particle effects or floodlight cone shaft geometry. The file summary mentions only a TypeScript type annotation fix, not these atmosphere effects. Stars from @react-three/drei are imported but floodlight cones and particle crowd wave effects are not confirmed present.

hallucinated_features.description: Stars (@react-three/drei) background effect added to the stadium scene
hallucinated_features.reason: The import of Stars from @react-three/drei is visible in the diff but was not requested in any requirement. A night-match floodlit feel was requested via floodlight cones, not a star field background.
